subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-10-12 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: The present condition of the Baha'i Cause in Germany is most satisfactory... Some of the German friends have asked that victory be given to Germany. We are not interfering with either party... May they attain to such heights of altruism as to be ready to sacrifice their lives for each other!
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @love and unity, @war and peace, @characteristics and conduct of true believers
